g.text: GlobalState (Singleton Memory Layout) | sizeof=64B (Cache Line Aligned)

ul.li: Memory Safety: GlobalState uses a fixed 64-byte layout to prevent false sharing and ensure cache-line alignment.
Atomic Operations: Hot swapping model versions requires an atomic pointer update (64-bit word swap) within the GIL.
Batching Strategy: A dynamic window of 50ms ensures that even under low load, requests are not delayed indefinitely.
Health Probes: Liveness is shallow; Readiness is deep (checks GPU memory + model state).
